how_it_works.title: How does it work?
how_it_works.step1_desc: Answer a few questions so we can understand your needs and match you with the right person.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our team will match you with the right volunteer based on your answers.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Start regular conversations with your volunteer in a convenient online chat format.

chat_mockup.title: A safe space to talk
chat_mockup.feature2: Regular support at your own pace
chat_mockup.mock_msg1: Hi! How are you feeling today?
chat_mockup.mock_msg3: I understand. Would you like to tell me about it? I'm here for you.
chat_mockup.conv2_msg1: Welcome! This is a safe space — feel free to share whatever you need.
chat_mockup.conv2_msg2: I don't really know where to start…
chat_mockup.conv2_msg3: That's completely fine. There's no rush. We can take it one step at a time.
chat_mockup.conv3_msg1: Hi there! I'm glad you reached out.
chat_mockup.conv3_msg2: I've been feeling overwhelmed with everything lately.
chat_mockup.conv3_msg3: That sounds really tough. You're not alone in this — let's talk through it together.

trust_mission.title: Our Mission
trust_mission.description: We create a safe space where everyone can receive anonymous psychological support. We connect people in need with trained volunteers who are ready to accompany them through difficult moments.

final_cta.title: You don't have to face it alone
final_cta.subtitle: Take the first step — fill out the form and receive free support from trained volunteers.

crisis.banner_text: In crisis? Call — help is free, anonymous, and available 24/7.
crisis.content_warning: The list below contains topics that may be sensitive. Select those you'd like support with.
crisis.under_18_text: If you're under 18, specialized help is available. Call the free Youth Helpline: 116 111.

donations.hero_subtitle: Together we can make mental health support accessible to everyone.

what_is.title: What is the Peryskop Foundation?
what_is.p1: The idea for this project was born out of a personal crisis and the need for support during a difficult time. From experience, we know how important the presence of other people can be in such moments.
what_is.p2: We are also aware of the potential hidden in difficult moments of life. Although it may not be visible at first, these moments can become a turning point toward positive change.
what_is.p3: The Peryskop Foundation is created for people who, despite the rapid growth of social media and the increasing presence of psychology in public discussions, still feel alone when facing a mental health crisis.
what_is.p4: We want to create a space without taboos — a place where people can meet on the deepest human level.
what_is.p5: We believe we have the right conditions to support the mental well-being of people like us, because in reality we all share similar concerns and challenges that define our humanity.
what_is.p6: Psychology is close to our hearts.
what_is.p7: Join us if you need help or if you want to help others. The role you take here does not have to remain the same forever. Each of us constantly changes, and a crisis often turns out to be only a temporary state.
what_is.p8: Together we can create a unique place where people experiencing difficult emotions receive support from our volunteers, who are themselves under constant professional supervision.
what_is.p9: Together we see more, can do more, and are better prepared to face the ongoing journey that is life.

goals.title: Our Goals
goals.goal1_desc: Provide free, anonymous psychological support to anyone who needs it — regardless of location or financial situation.
goals.goal2_desc: Build a community of well-trained volunteers who offer empathetic, supervised support in one-on-one conversations.
goals.goal3_desc: Create a space without taboos where mental health challenges are met with understanding, not judgment.
goals.goal4_desc: Leverage modern technology to make online mental health support effective, safe, and always available.

how_we_work.title: How We Work
how_we_work.p1: Our project began online, and we want to continue building our community on the internet.
how_we_work.p2: Although we live in different parts of Poland, we work together toward a shared goal and believe that effective support can also happen online. For some people, this may be the only accessible form of help.
how_we_work.p3: We created a safe platform in the form of a chat system designed to connect people experiencing a crisis with volunteers offering support.
how_we_work.p4: This support takes the form of one-on-one conversations held regularly over time.
how_we_work.p5: If, like us, you believe that modern technology can also have a positive impact on mental health — welcome aboard.

donate.title: Donations
donate.subtitle: Our services are completely free of charge, but without the help of donors we cannot achieve our mission.
donate.supporters: {{count}}+ people have already supported this project

homepage_preview.title: Support Our Mission
homepage_preview.desc: Our services are completely free. Help us continue providing anonymous psychological support to those who need it most.

register_chat_support.title: Create an account to start the chat
register_chat_support.subtitle: You need an account to talk with a volunteer in the chat.
register_chat_support.notice: Support at Peryskop is anonymous and free. We only need an account to securely connect you with your chat and notify you when a volunteer is assigned.

help_rules_items.1: Support for people in crisis is provided free of charge by volunteers.
help_rules_items.2: A volunteer is a psychology student, a psychologist after graduation, or a psychotherapist who provides services for the Peryskop Foundation voluntarily, without remuneration, in line with the assigned tasks. The volunteer works under the supervision of the appointed Volunteer Supervisor, who is responsible for onboarding, ongoing support, oversight of assigned tasks, and ensuring safe working conditions for the volunteer.
help_rules_items.3: The goal is not to provide professional psychiatric, psychological, or psychotherapeutic help, and the support is not a form of therapy nor a substitute for treatment.
help_rules_items.4: Foundation support is available only to adults (over 18 years of age).
help_rules_items.5: The “Agreement” concerns the frequency and rules of contact between the volunteer and the person in crisis.
help_rules_items.6: The volunteer does not receive any remuneration in any form and does not expect any compensation.
help_rules_items.7: The volunteer is obliged to maintain confidentiality and secrecy. The exception is situations where there is a threat to the life of the beneficiary — then the volunteer undertakes to report it to the Volunteer Coordinator and the appropriate services.
help_rules_items.8: The volunteer undertakes to treat the supported person as a subject and not to cross their boundaries.
help_rules_items.9: Arranging contact outside the Peryskop Foundation chat is prohibited.
help_rules_items.10: A person in crisis has the right to receive support no less than once a week, for at least one hour per week.
help_rules_items.11: Both the volunteer and the person in crisis are obliged to comply with the rules contained in the Agreement.
help_rules_items.12: Any abuse should be reported immediately via the form available on the Peryskop Foundation website.

chat.help_rules_placeholder: Support rules will appear here soon.

transfer.author: Author

subtitle: Thank you for your trust. Fill out this short form so we can prepare support for you.
We will use this email address to notify you when we find the right volunteer.
Describe your situation as clearly as you can so we can match you with the right volunteer.
Tell us whether you prefer regular scheduled chat sessions or a looser exchange of messages.
How did you hear about our foundation?

That's everything. We will email you when we find a volunteer for you. Keep checking the website for the “CHAT” tab, remember to check your spam folder as well, and if you have any problems with the chat write to kontakt@fundacjaperyskop.org. Whether you chose scheduled sessions or a looser exchange of messages, please do not expect an immediate reply right after assignment — it may take a few days. Thank you for your trust.

success.lead: That's everything. We will email you as soon as we find a volunteer for you.

chat.title: What happens next
chat.body: Keep checking the website. When the “CHAT” tab appears in the top menu, everything is ready.

email.title: Check your inbox
email.body: Remember to check your spam folder as well. If you have any problems with the chat, write to kontakt@fundacjaperyskop.org.

timing.title: When to expect a reply
timing.body: Whether you chose scheduled sessions or a looser exchange of messages, please do not expect an immediate reply. After you are assigned to a volunteer, it may still take a few days.

title_new_user: Thank you for filling out the form!
mentee.contact_preference_label: What kind of contact would you prefer?
mentee.contact_preference_hint: We do not have a mobile app with notifications yet, so a looser exchange of messages will feel closer to email than instant messaging.

scheduled.title: Regular, scheduled sessions
scheduled.description: Choose a steady rhythm of conversations at agreed times.

asynchronous.title: Looser exchange of messages
asynchronous.description: Messages will feel more like email than real-time chat.
